subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical place is associated with Maharana Pratap?
question_hi: महारा��نعيمलंदा सम्बंधित किस घरगुती स्थल है?
explanation_en: Maharanis of Mewar, especially Queen Karnavati, are known for their contribution to the construction of Hawa Mahal. The palace was built by Maharaja Pratap Singh.
